M
Growth AI · AI Visibility
5 engines · live
Citation gap
Your Ergonomic Chair page is barely cited
Competitor chair pages average 90 citations; yours has 12. The description is too thin for engines to quote — and you are absent from “best ergonomic chair 2026” in three of five engines. Depth, not price, is the gap.
Category gap
deskhaus owns “ergonomic chair 2026”
For your highest-intent chair query, deskhaus and workwell are cited above you on ChatGPT and Perplexity. You surface in only two of five engines — and never in the first answer.
Citations dropping
Perplexity citations fell 40% this month
After your comparison guide came down in March, Perplexity stopped citing you for desk comparisons. $2.1K of monthly AI revenue rides on Perplexity — restoring the guide is the fastest recovery.
